inlineContent.text: , поставляемый в формате толстого бинарного XCFramework.
работу с входящими и исходящими медиа-треками
размытие и замену фона для исходящего видео
транспорт для передачи команд и мета-данных специфичных для приложения
Поддержка iOS 15 есть, но находится в стадии deprecated. Стабильность работы на ней не тестируется и не гарантируется. Поддержка может быть прекращена в скором времени.

SDK поддерживает работу на симуляторах, однако полноценное тестирование должно проводиться на реальном устройстве, т.к. имплементация работы с камерой, размытие фона, набор поддерживаемых кодеков и видео-форматов могут отличаться.

entity.
A value representing a Mean Opinion Score (MOS), which rates the perceived quality of a media stream
on a scale ranging from 1.0 (poor) to 5.0 (excellent).
A container for video encoding configuration.
Observer protocol for receiving channel session events and state updates.
A high-level interface combining all core SDK engine capabilities.
A value type describing a media track produced by a peer.
Errors on gzipping/gunzipping based on the zlib error codes.
A type-safe unique identifier for a client instance.
An interface for observing video source state changes.
Represents errors that can occur during media capture operations.
A value type describing an audio routing configuration.
A video media source that does not provide a preview rendering surface.
The direction of network traffic described by a network quality report.
A configuration container describing the SDK server-side environment.
A configuration preset describing audio encoding parameters.
Represents a dynamically typed value used for payload serialization.
A runtime model representing a channel participant and its media state.
Represents a group or role assigned to a participant within a channel.
Represents an active channel session responsible for managing peers and media tracks.
Represents the role of a participant in a media session.
An interface for structured, level-based logging.
A video media source that provides a preview rendering surface.
A value type describing traffic statistics for a specific media track.
A type-safe identifier for a peer in a channel session.
An interface for managing channel session lifecycle.
An interface representing a media track source.

Namespace for SDK-level utilities and metadata.
An interface for ChannelSession that allows subscribing for

Observers are not retained internally.
All observer methods will be called on main thread.

An interface for managing audio routing. Each route represents both

Errors that describe channel session connection and recovery failures.

A type-safe identifier for a channel (which can also be called “room” in application terms).

An interface for displaying a camera preview.

A concrete media source representing a local audio track.

An interface representing a type that can be described by a MIME type.

entity.

A snapshot of network quality metrics for a media session at a specific point in time.

Represents the lifecycle state of a channel session.

Each type has its own specific load balancing logic.

Represents all errors that can be produced by the LiveDigital engine.

A value type describing an activity-required event within a session.

A wrapper around
that injects call-site metadata.

The default implementation of the LiveDigital SDK engine for use in the main application.
